message:
test: Next.js bootstrap harness, React strict mode leak tests, and expanded trace/obligation coverage

Adds tests/nextjs_bootstrap_harness.rs exercising the hydration-safe
bootstrap state machine: SSR->hydration->runtime deterministic flow,
failure recovery (reset-to-hydrating vs retry-runtime-init), soft/hard
navigation handling, hot reload phase transitions, and snapshot
determinism across identical command sequences.

Adds tests/react_wasm_strictmode_harness.rs validating React strict
mode double-invocation behavior: verifies that mount/unmount/remount
cycles are leak-free, cancel-correct, and produce consistent scope/
task/cancel event counts across strict mode cycles. Tests dispatcher
boundary state, provider phase transitions, and outcome envelopes
through the full strict mode lifecycle.

Extends wasm_abi_contract tests with additional bootstrap transition
validation including new recovery paths (RuntimeFailed->Hydrating,
Hydrated->ServerRendered) and invalid transition rejection.

Expands cancel_obligation_invariants with new invariant checks,
obligation_wasm_parity with extended boundary state coverage,
replay_e2e_suite with replay window and artifact pinning tests, and
scheduler_browser_determinism with capture metadata field assertions
for the new browser trace schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
